name: Incredibly Creamy Chocolate (Tofu) Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. Sunspire Chocolate Chips or Carob Chips
1 9-inch Pride O' the Farm Graham Cracker or Cookie Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chocolate chips in a double boiler or pan sitting in water until smooth.
2. Add honey and stir to combine.
3. In a blender or food processor, blend the silken tofu until smooth.
4. Mix the blended tofu with the chocolate and honey mixture until creamy.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust.
6. Chill overnight.
7. Slice and serve.
